name: Diabetic Strawberry Jam
recipeIngredient: Concentrated white grape juice (1/2 cup, simmered down from 1-1/2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place berry juices and lemon rind in a saucepan.
2. Mash berries slightly to release juice.
3. Heat mixture to boiling.
4. Sprinkle unflavored gelatin over the hot mixture.
5. Remove from heat, skim any residue, and pack into hot jars with hot lids.
6. Cool to room temperature before storing.
Note: This can be stored in an airtight, leakproof container suitable for freezing, including plastic containers. It tastes better if allowed to sit for a week and freezes beautifully for up to 6 months.
